operating_model: make-to-stock distribution from a central warehouse to regional branches

known_systems.name: ERP
known_systems.role: system of record for stock and orders

stated_pain_points.description: Frequent stockouts on fast-moving SKUs despite reported stock on hand
Physical counts routinely disagree with the ERP

urgency.business_trigger: an external stock-count audit flagged material discrepancies

initial_scope_hypothesis: Inventory record accuracy is being eroded by uncontrolled adjustments and unreconciled branch processes; focus the assessment on counting discipline and adjustment controls.
first_billing_tranche_objective: Deliver an evidence-based initial assessment that quantifies record-accuracy issues and identifies quick wins, positioning a scoped next-phase remediation engagement.

blockers: ERP export access pending IT approval
assessment_readiness.notes: Site walk-around can proceed while data access is arranged.

consultant_notes: Sponsor is motivated by the audit finding; move quickly on the walk-around to build early evidence.
